summary: Complete end-to-end testing of AI Discoverability Copilot Phases 1-4. All backend APIs (audit, AI testing, monitoring, reports) and frontend functionality working correctly. All 22 backend tests passed and 13 frontend integration tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: Health endpoint returns healthy status with DB connected
User registration and login working with JWT authentication
Protected routes properly secured with Bearer token authentication
POST /api/audit returns proper audit scores with deterministic results
GET /api/audit returns list of user audits with proper pagination
POST /api/ai-test returns citation probability and breakdown analysis
GET /api/ai-test returns list of user AI tests
POST /api/monitor successfully adds monitored pages with initial snapshots
GET /api/monitor returns list of monitored pages with change counts
POST /api/monitor/{id}/refresh detects changes between snapshots
GET /api/monitor/{id}/changes returns detailed change logs
DELETE /api/monitor/{id} removes monitored pages and cleanup data
GET /api/reports/overview returns dashboard summary with aggregated stats
GET /api/reports/trends returns audit and test trends over time
GET /api/reports/competitors returns URL comparison analysis
Frontend login page loads with proper authentication forms
Dashboard displays real-time stats with health status indicators
Audits page loads with functional audit form and result display
AI Tests page loads with dual-input form (URL + query) working correctly
Monitoring page loads with add monitor form and list view
Reports page loads with all three tabs (Overview, Trends, Competitors) functional
Sidebar navigation between all pages working smoothly
All forms submit successfully and display results/errors appropriately
success_percentage: backend: 100% (22/22 tests passed), frontend: 100% (13/13 tests passed)
